description_long: This combat tactical vehicle features a low, angular profile with a sleek, stealth-inspired design. The body is predominantly black with subtle orange highlights along the edges, giving it a futuristic and aggressive appearance. Two prominent, sharply pointed extensions project from the front, suggesting reinforced armor or weapon mounts. The vehicle sits on a single, wide, circular base that may function as a hover or anti-gravity propulsion system, as no traditional wheels are visible. The top view reveals a central raised section, possibly a cockpit or command module, flanked by broad, flat surfaces. The overall construction appears robust, with hard, faceted surfaces and minimal visible openings or access points.
description: A sleek, black, angular combat tactical vehicle with pointed front extensions, orange highlights, and a wide circular base, suggesting advanced propulsion and heavy armor.
description_view_0: Side view showing the sharply pointed front extensions, low profile, and the wide circular base beneath the vehicle.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the central raised cockpit area and the symmetrical, angular body shape.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the pointed extensions and the circular base.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the broad, flat back and the central raised section, with no visible exhaust or access points.
attribute_weapon_mounts: Two visible mounts at the front extensions, likely for energy or projectile weapons.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, angular armor plating; surfaces appear sloped for deflection.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: None visible; solid black with orange highlights.
